top_signals.title: Trump says Ukraine lacks leverage. His own officials say otherwise.
top_signals.summary: Rubio called Ukraine’s military the strongest in Europe, while Driscoll told senators the U.S. is playing catch-up with Kyiv’s Delta command network.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FTC warns 12 major tech firms of violating Take It Down Act
top_signals.summary: The law mandates that platforms make it easy for people to ask that nonconsensual intimate images be removed and to delete them within 48 hours of a request.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
